flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Norco College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.1k → $12.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Norco College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Norco College are 48% above 6-year earnings ($34.5k → $51.2k).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Norco College are 21% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($51.2k vs $42.2k).
